# Pull Request Template

## Summary

- Describe what changed.
- Explain why the change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Workflow syntax validated (`validate-packaging` passes).
- [ ] Reusable workflow/action interface changes documented in `README.md`.
- [ ] Migration impact captured in `docs/workflow-migration-audit.md`.

## Adoption Notes

- Consumer repos affected:
- Required `uses:` ref updates (tag/SHA):
